message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle handwritten
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #D6EAF8
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 1
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBackgroundColor #D6EAF8
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderColor #000000

participant "CNBRPfwPlayCtl" as CNBRPfwPlayCtl {
    participant "INBRPlayCCSink" as INBRPlayCCSink
    participant "CNBRPfwPlayCtl" as CNBRPfwPlayCtl2
}

participant "CNBRPfwUICtl" as CNBRPfwUICtl

participant "CNBRUIMgr" as CNBRUIMgr {
    participant "INBRCommand" as INBRCommand
    participant "CNBRUIMgr" as CNBRUIMgr2
}

participant "CNBRPlayMgr" as CNBRPlayMgr
participant "CNBRPlayBar" as CNBRPlayBar
participant "CWbxBmpButton" as CWbxBmpButton

== nmac notify nbr_pfw mute message ==

INBRPlayCCSink -> INBRPlayCCSink: NotifyInfo
INBRPlayCCSink -> CNBRPfwPlayCtl2: NotifyInfo
CNBRPfwPlayCtl2 -> CNBRPfwUICtl: OnMixerMuteNotify
note right of CNBRPfwPlayCtl2: NBR_CC_PFW_INFO_MUTE_STATE
CNBRPfwUICtl -> INBRCommand: OnHandleCommand
note right of CNBRPfwUICtl: NBR2_PLAY_UI_MIXER_MUTE_NOTIFY
INBRCommand -> CNBRUIMgr2: OnHandleCommand
note right of INBRCommand: NBR2_PLAY_UI_MIXER_MUTE_NOTIFY
CNBRUIMgr2 -> CNBRPlayMgr: HandleMixerMuteNotify
CNBRPlayMgr -> CNBRPlayBar: MuteVolume
CNBRPlayBar -> CWbxBmpButton: SetChecked

@enduml
